subjectOptions: A cleaner location pipeline for your production team
Locations, stays, events — all in one platform

template.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

I'm reaching out from SetVenue. We're a production marketplace built for teams that need locations, crew housing, and event venues — all in one place.

If your team regularly sources homes, lofts, studios, or specialty spaces, we can support you with lower fees (10% vs Giggster's 15-25%), curated inventory, and partnership options for teams with recurring booking needs.

If this is relevant, I'd be glad to send over a short partnership overview or set up a quick conversation.

Best,
{{senderName}}
SetVenue
